# ImagePlaygroundViewController.Delegate

**Protocol**

An interface you use to receive images and handle events related to an image-generation view controller.

## Declaration

```swift
@objc(ImageGenerationViewControllerDelegate) protocol Delegate : NSObjectProtocol
```

## Overview

Adopt the [doc://com.apple.ImagePlayground/documentation/ImagePlayground/ImagePlaygroundViewController/Delegate-swift.protocol] protocol in a custom type and assign that type as the delegate of an [doc://com.apple.ImagePlayground/documentation/ImagePlayground/ImagePlaygroundViewController] object. When you present the view controller, the system interface handles interactions with the person and reports the results back to your delegate object.

## Receiving the image

- **imagePlaygroundViewController(_:didCreateImageAt:)**: Returns the generated image to the delegate.

## Handling cancellation events

- **imagePlaygroundViewControllerDidCancel(_:)**: Notifies the delegate that the person canceled the generation of the image.

## Processing a generated image

- **delegate**: The delegate object that receives the generated image and handles events from the view controller.

## Inherits From

- NSObjectProtocol
